Test Description: Negative-edge interrupt enable and handling across GPIO[8..39]; programs pad control, enables group interrupt, toggles pads low via external register, waits for ISR, validates status/clear and system raw status clear.
Test Steps / Procedure:
1) Entry: test_case() sets test_err=0.
2) Conditional IRQ enable: if GPIO0 defined -> GIC_EnableIRQ(87); if GPIO1 defined -> GIC_EnableIRQ(88).
3) Enable SoC system interrupt: if GPIO0 defined -> write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1, LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO0_INTR); if GPIO1 defined -> write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1, LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO1_INTR).
4) Initialize external pad state: write_reg(0xA0243ffc, 0xffffffff).
5) For i=0..31: addr1=MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8 + (i*4); write_reg(addr1, (1<<20)|(1<<18)|(1<<16)); wait_on(10).
6) For i=0..31: wr_val=(1<<i); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1, wr_val); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1, wr_val); wait_on(10); set int_pend=1; write_reg(0xA0243ffc, 0xffffffff); wait_on(30); write_reg(0xA0243ffc, ~wr_val); start timeout=5000; while(int_pend && timeout--) wait_on(10); if timeout==0: printf timeout error and test_err++.
7) Exit: finish(test_err).
8) Default_IRQHandler(): compute local_wr=(1<<i); set int_pend=0; write_reg(0xA0243ffc, 0xffffffff); raddr= MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4); rdata=read_reg(raddr); if((rdata & 0x1)!=0) test_err++; if((rdata & 0x2)!=0): read rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); if((rdata_grp & local_wr)==0) test_err++; reprogram pad: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4), (1<<20)|(1<<16)); clear raw: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1, local_wr); verify group status cleared: rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); if(rdata_grp!=0) test_err++; if GPIO0: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1, LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO0_INTR); GIC_ClearIRQ(87); if GPIO1: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1, LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO1_INTR); GIC_ClearIRQ(88); else branch: test_err++.
Validation / Acceptance Criteria:
- No timeout during ISR wait loop for any i in [0..31].
- In ISR: (rdata & 0x1)==0 and (rdata & 0x2)!=0.
- Group status bit set corresponds to local_wr, then cleared after RAW_STCLR1 write; MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1 reads back 0.
- System RAW_STCR1 written and corresponding GIC interrupt cleared.
- Overall: test_err==0 and finish(0).
Gap Analysis: Potential undefined GPIO macro selection (GPIO0/GPIO1) not enforced; relies on external pad-driving register 0xA0243ffc without verification of actual pad hardware; no debouncing/noise checks; limited to group1 (pads 8..39) only; no positive-edge or level modes tested here.
